messages.content:
Instructions: Answer the following question about drug properties.
Context: Drug-induced liver injury (DILI) is fatal liver disease caused by drugs and it has been the single most frequent cause of safety-related drug marketing withdrawals for the past 50 years (e.g. iproniazid, ticrynafen, benoxaprofen). 
Question: Given a drug SMILES string, predict whether it
(A) cannot cause DILI (B) can cause DILI
Drug SMILES: COc1ccc2c(C(=O)c3ccc(Cl)cc3)c(C)n(CC(=O)O)c2c1
Please think step by step and use the relevant tools in your analysis. Then put your final choice ((A) or (B)) after "Answer:"
